app.userQuestion: What's the difference between O(n) and O(n²)?
app.aiAnswer: O(n) means execution time grows linearly with data size — if you double n, you double the time. O(n²) grows quadratically: doubling n quadruples the time. In practice, always prefer O(n) when possible!

q1.question: Can I try h-learning Plus before subscribing?
q1.answer: Yes. h-learning Plus offers a 7-day free trial with no commitment.

q2.question: What is included in h-learning Plus?
q2.answer: You get access to premium courses, hands-on projects, and professional certificates.

q3.question: Does h-learning Plus save money?
q3.answer: Yes. It is much cheaper than paying for each course individually.

q4.question: Can I cancel anytime?
q4.answer: Yes. You can cancel anytime from your dashboard.

visaObtain.subtitle: Follow the complete visa application process for Zambia in 4 simple steps, from choosing your visa type to receiving the final document.

step1.label: Step 1 — Choose
step1.title: Choose your visa type
step1.desc: Select the visa that fits your situation: tourist, business, transit, or Zambia e-Visa.
step1.d1: Single or multiple entry tourist visa

step2.label: Step 2 — Complete
step2.title: Fill out the application form
step2.desc: Complete the online form and upload the required documents: passport, photo, and travel proof.
step2.d2: Passport valid for at least 6 months
step2.d3: ID photo and proof of stay

step3.label: Step 3 — Pay
step3.title: Pay the visa fees
step3.desc: Make a secure online payment based on the chosen visa type and desired length of stay.
step3.d2: Fees based on nationality and duration

step4.label: Step 4 — Receive
step4.title: Receive your visa
step4.desc: Your visa is issued by email (e-Visa) or on arrival at the point of entry in Zambia.

visaRenewal.subtitle: Extend your stay in Zambia by following these 4 clear steps, before your current visa expires.

step1.label: Step 1 — Prepare
step1.title: Prepare your file
step1.desc: Gather your passport, current visa, and required supporting documents before the expiry date.

step2.label: Step 2 — Submit
step2.title: Submit the renewal application
step2.desc: Submit your application to the Zambia Immigration Department, online or in person.

step3.label: Step 3 — Pay
step3.title: Pay the renewal fees
step3.desc: Pay the fees corresponding to your visa category and the requested extension period.

step4.label: Step 4 — Receive
step4.title: Collect your renewed visa
step4.desc: Collect your passport with the renewed visa, valid for the new granted period.

cta.title: Renew your Zambian visa before the deadline.
